ksa_text: Knowledge of global data protection regulations and privacy laws, including GDPR, CCPA/CPRA, LGPD, PDPA, and sector-specific privacy obligations, with focus on applicable legal bases for processing and regulatory enforcement.

eu_ai_act.top_element_label: Obligations of deployers of high-risk AI systems

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Obligations of deployers of high-risk AI systems

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Security & Platform Strategy KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.444) to justify inclusion for the Data Platform Team Lead. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: This Knowledge KSA was excluded as an edge case, yet it has a composite score of 0.444 (moderate signal). Knowledge-dimension KSAs represent conceptual awareness rather than execution; exclusion may be too aggressive.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Edge-domain Knowledge KSAs require more than moderate signal to justify inclusion; the role's scope does not regularly engage with Security & Platform Strategy. Exclusion upheld.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Upheld: edge-domain exclusion maintained. Security & Platform Strategy is not sufficiently central to the Data Platform Team Lead to warrant inclusion at this signal level.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world Data Platform Team Lead roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Security & Platform Strategy is not a standard competency expectation for Data Platform Team Lead. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Data Platform Team Lead competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.444) and edge-domain placement (Security & Platform Strategy) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Data Platform Team Lead. All passes support exclusion.
